config.script:
#include "50629"
function fopen(): fopen = false if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_FORM_ZAMOWIENIE_IID) and trans_.var(APPVAR_FORM_ZAMOWIENIE_IID) > clng(-1) then dim pPage: set pPage = find_page_on_iid(trans_.var(APPVAR_FORM_ZAMOWIENIE_IID)) if not pPage is nothing then pPage.autosave_doc() end if end if end function
